title: Grandad Gifts Coaster, Gifts for Grandad, Grandad Gifts from Grandchildren, Grandad Christmas Fathers Day Birthday Gifts, Grandad Coaster 10cm x 10cm
features: 【Gifts for Grandad】Look no further for birthday gifts for grandad who has everything. Show your love for your grandad with a special gift, grandad gifts coasters are the perfect choice.
【Size】This grandad gifts coaster measures 10cm x 10cm, cute and delicate, can play host to pretty much any size glass, good non slip effect, can effectively insulate and protect the table.

【Grandad Christmas Gifts】Our coaster are perfect gift for grandad on Christmas, grandad birthday, grandad retirement, Father's Day, Thanksgiving Day, and other meaningful moments to show your sincere love for your grandad.
【Material】Presents for grandad coaster is made of wood, the wood texture is uniform, smooth to touch, hard and tough, hard to deform or break.
【Easy to Care】Our grandad gifts coaster cleaning is very simple, you just simply wipe over the surface with a damp cloth, then buff with a dry cloth, and put it in a cool, ventilated and dry place.
description: Specification: Name: Grandad gift coaster Material: Wood Size: 10 x 10 x 1 cm/ 3.94 x 3.94 x 0.4 inch Color: as pictures shown Package includes: 1 x Grandad gift coaster Note: Please do not put into the dishwasher as this will ruin the beech wood.
